name: Division by Zero
description: Division where the denominator derives from a parameter or external input and no guard ensures it is non-zero.

teachingExample.explanation: compute_average divides total by count with no zero guard

smt2ProofTemplate:
(declare-const {{numerator}} Int)
(declare-const {{denominator}} Int)
; Guard: path condition ensures {{denominator}} != 0
(assert (not (= {{denominator}} 0)))
; Can {{denominator}} still be zero?
(assert (= {{denominator}} 0))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: guard prevents division by zero
